note: Fix 3: 9-fold LODO ExtraTrees ensemble (avg raw probabilities) with the Fix 2b live transform retained (b=0.45, offset=-0.010). Ensemble is the robustness lever; transform stays at proven-safe live values to avoid regressing into the b=0.14 all-BOT failure mode under live raw-shift. Single-LODO matches Fix 2b baseline; ensemble_loo OOF mean=1.000 with fpr_max=0.000 on benchmark. See reports/SIM_TO_REAL_DIAGNOSIS.md.
